name: Telesummit Funnel
origin: Online event-based selling format featuring multiple expert speakers in sequence — the audio/phone-era ancestor of the video summit. Listed alongside webinars, sales pages, and VSLs as a primary online selling modality.

whenToUse.summary: Use for a multi-speaker interview-series event delivered primarily by audio/dial-in (or low-production audio interviews), with a paid all-access recordings upgrade — when video production is impractical or the audience prefers listen-on-the-go.
goals: Run a multi-speaker event without video production overhead
Reach a listen-while-busy audience via audio/dial-in interviews
Build a list and monetize via paid all-access recordings
signals: Multiple speakers but low video-production capacity
Interview/conversation format rather than slide presentation
Wants list growth + recordings upsell like a summit
antiSignals: Needs visual demo/slides (use Summit or Webinar)

pageStructure.purpose: Sell the free registration with the speaker schedule and the audio-event promise.
keyElements: Free opt-in form (email + phone for dial-in/SMS)
How-it-works: dial in or stream audio

pageStructure.purpose: Deliver dial-in details and session links, and pitch the all-access upgrade.
keyElements: Order form with bump for the upgrade

pageStructure.purpose: Host each audio interview for its live/available window.
keyElements: Speaker bio + their free gift/lead-magnet link
Availability window note (expires to drive upgrade)

pageStructure.purpose: Sell the full recordings bundle to those who want permanent access.

scripts: Registration positioning = StoryBrand SB7 (clear promise for a multi-speaker event)
Host intro / interview framing = Epiphany Bridge
copyFramework.notes: Same authority/list mechanics as the video Summit, but copy must sell the audio/dial-in convenience ('listen on your commute'). The recordings upsell carries the monetization.

automations: Register → dial-in details + daily 'session live' SMS/email sequence
Tag by sessions attended → tailored upgrade offers
All-access purchase → grant recordings access + exit upsell
Post-event → expiring recordings offer to free registrants
ghlBuild.notes: Skill 6 builds the registration, delivery/upsell, session, and upgrade pages with audio players; Skill 44 generates the opt-in form, audio player embeds, the all-access order form + bump, the SMS reminder widget, and the upgrade countdown.
